lesson.title: 1.5 FITNESS ACTIVITIES
topics: Fitness goes beyond physical abilities like sit-ups or running. It’s about the body’s systems
working efficiently to meet every day’s demands and adapt to stress. Fitness connects closely
to developing overall well-being. It includes physical, social, emotional, spiritual, and mental
activities: Fitness goes beyond physical abilities like sit-ups or running. It’s about the body’s systems
working efficiently to meet every day’s demands and adapt to stress. Fitness connects closely
to developing overall well-being. It includes physical, social, emotional, spiritual, and mental
and fitness are intertwined, emphasizing the importance of being fit enough to handle life’s
challenges, whether academic or athletic. This perspective teaches learners that total fitness
contributes to success in both sports and daily life.
